requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池危险品运输 — UN 38.3
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池危險品運輸 — UN 38.3

summary.en: Lithium batteries shipped to New Zealand must satisfy UN 38.3 test requirements in the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria and be classified, packed, marked, labelled, and documented under the applicable sea, air, and domestic dangerous-goods transport rules. BESS shipments commonly involve UN 3480, UN 3481, or large battery / cargo transport unit classifications depending on the shipping configuration. The UN 38.3 test summary should match the actual cell and pack configuration supplied.
summary.zh: 运往新西兰的锂电池须满足《联合国试验和标准手册》UN 38.3 测试要求，并按适用的海运、空运和国内危险品运输规则完成分类、包装、标记、标签和文件。BESS 货物通常根据运输配置涉及 UN 3480、UN 3481 或大型电池/货物运输单元分类。UN 38.3 测试摘要应与实际供应的电芯和电池包配置一致。
summary.zht: 運往紐西蘭的鋰電池須滿足《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》UN 38.3 測試要求，並按適用的海運、空運和國內危險品運輸規則完成分類、包裝、標記、標籤和文件。BESS 貨物通常根據運輸配置涉及 UN 3480、UN 3481 或大型電池/貨物運輸單元分類。UN 38.3 測試摘要應與實際供應的電芯和電池包配置一致。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3
IMDG Code — sea transport of dangerous goods
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations — air transport of dangerous goods
UN 3480 / UN 3481 / UN 3536 — common lithium battery classifications depending on configuration

summary.en: China exporters also use UN 38.3 for lithium battery export, with supporting dangerous-goods documentation for sea and air shipments. This is the closest alignment area between China and New Zealand. However, Chinese domestic road-transport rules and Chinese-language shipping papers are not enough for New Zealand import, local storage, or onward carriage.
summary.zh: 中国出口商同样使用 UN 38.3 进行锂电池出口，并为海运和空运提供危险品文件。这是中国与新西兰最接近的合规领域。然而，中国国内道路运输规则和中文运输文件不足以满足新西兰进口、本地储存或后续运输要求。
summary.zht: 中國出口商同樣使用 UN 38.3 進行鋰電池出口，並為海運和空運提供危險品文件。這是中國與紐西蘭最接近的合規領域。然而，中國國內道路運輸規則和中文運輸文件不足以滿足紐西蘭進口、本地儲存或後續運輸要求。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — same international test requirement for lithium battery export
GB 12268 — China list of dangerous goods
JT/T 617 — China road transport of dangerous goods

gap.en: UN 38.3 evidence is transferable only if it matches the shipped configuration and is accompanied by correct English-language dangerous-goods documentation. The importer and carrier must confirm New Zealand handling, storage, port, road, and emergency-response requirements for the specific UN number and packaging method. China domestic dangerous-goods documents do not replace New Zealand transport compliance checks.
gap.zh: UN 38.3 证据只有在与运输配置一致并附有正确英文危险品文件时才具备可转用价值。进口商和承运人须针对具体 UN 编号和包装方式确认新西兰装卸、储存、港口、道路和应急响应要求。中国国内危险品文件不能替代新西兰运输合规核验。
gap.zht: UN 38.3 證據只有在與運輸配置一致並附有正確英文危險品文件時才具備可轉用價值。進口商和承運人須針對具體 UN 編號和包裝方式確認紐西蘭裝卸、儲存、港口、道路和應急響應要求。中國國內危險品文件不能替代紐西蘭運輸合規核驗。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 required for lithium battery transport; IMDG / IATA and local dangerous-goods rules apply depending on mode
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for lithium battery export — UN 38.3 required; China domestic transport rules are separate

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 is necessary for lithium BESS transport to New Zealand, but it is not a full market-access approval. The shipped configuration, UN number, packaging, labels, safety data, and New Zealand carrier documentation still need project-specific verification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3 是锂电 BESS 运往新西兰所必需的运输要求，但并非完整市场准入批准。运输配置、UN 编号、包装、标签、安全数据和新西兰承运文件仍需按项目核验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3 是鋰電 BESS 運往紐西蘭所必需的運輸要求，但並非完整市場准入批准。運輸配置、UN 編號、包裝、標籤、安全資料和紐西蘭承運文件仍需按項目核驗。
